subjects.name: Numerical and Mathematical Ability (Session 1)
subjects.analysis: Basic arithmetic questions focusing on speed. This section is qualifying only.

subjects.name: Reasoning Ability (Session 1)
subjects.analysis: Easy level reasoning. Scoring here helps clear the Session 1 threshold easily.

subjects.name: General Awareness (Session 2 - Merit)
subjects.analysis: Crucial for merit. Static GK and Art & Culture are heavily tested.

subjects.name: English Language (Session 2 - Merit)
subjects.analysis: Basic grammar and comprehension. Accuracy is vital due to negative marking.

mentorship_data.title: Session 1 Strategy
mentorship_data.content: Attempt reasoning first then numerical ability. There is NO negative marking in this session, so attempt all 40 questions to ensure you cross the qualifying cutoff.

mentorship_data.title: Session 2 Strategy
mentorship_data.content: Final Merit is based ONLY on Session 2. Focus on accuracy because every wrong answer costs 1 mark. Target GA first followed by English.

mentorship_data.title: Havaldar PET/PST
mentorship_data.content: Prepare for walking (1600m in 15 mins for males) and height/chest requirements as per official standards.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Is there negative marking in all sessions?
frequently_asked_questions.a: No, negative marking is only present in Session 2 (General Awareness & English).

frequently_asked_questions.q: Are marks from Session 1 added to the final merit?
frequently_asked_questions.a: No, Session 1 is qualifying only. Merit is decided solely on Session 2 marks.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Is English compulsory for all candidates?
frequently_asked_questions.a: Yes, English is a mandatory part of Session 2.

frequently_asked_questions.q: What is the minimum qualification for MTS?
frequently_asked_questions.a: Candidates must have passed 10th standard (Matriculation) from a recognized board.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Is the PET test required for MTS posts?
frequently_asked_questions.a: No, PET/PST is mandatory only for candidates applying for the Havaldar post.
